source_ref.compose_env_source: existing external 211 runtime env file supplied through compose --env-file; values were not copied or printed
source_ref.deployment_note: runtime-only image rebased from the previous healthy image because dependencies did not change; compose used --no-build with the reviewed image tag. Source revision, OCI revision, runtime-subject, and source_revision alias labels point to cbbfaff. The compose environment-file label still records an external env-file path, so this evidence does not copy or expose runtime secrets.

review_notes: This entry records a reviewed Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the cbbfaff Foundation Alpha POC runtime.
The smoke verified unauthenticated denial, invalid gateway-secret denial, ordinary-user Admin Runtime denial, and same-tenant admin auth/Admin Runtime access.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, connection strings, object locators, executor-only internals, runtime workspace paths, real user identifiers, runtime env-file paths, and personal workstation paths.

Source revision, OCI revision, runtime-subject, and source_revision alias labels point to cbbfaff. The external env-file compose label remains a deployment-layout follow-up and must not be read as committed env content.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline for cbbfaff only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, packaged frontend image release acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, or Foundation Alpha.
open_followups: #21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
Signed package or SBOM review evidence for Skill release remains open.
External env-file compose layout should be reconciled before G0 source-authority closure; no env values were copied or printed.
